summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Physiocare.Ai landing page. All major features working perfectly including hero section with waveform animation, pricing toggle with 20% discount, FAQ accordion, mobile responsiveness, and sticky navigation. Minor data-testid issue found for one navigation link.

design_issues.issue: Navigation link 'how-it-works' data-testid not found, though actual link works

passed_tests: Hero section with Physiocare.Ai branding and waveform animation
Trust badges display (HIPAA Compliant, Works with Jane/WebPT, No code setup, Live in 48 hrs)
Book a Free Demo CTA button functionality
See How It Works button scroll functionality
Problem/Solution section with teal solution card
Features grid with 6 PT-specific feature cards
Testimonials section with 3 DPT testimonial cards and metrics
Pricing section with 3 tiers (Starter, Growth, Enterprise)
Integrations marquee with 8 physio software logos
Mobile responsive design with proper stacking
